findings: Wet pipe sprinkler system; system age 28 years
NFPA 13 compliant: Yes
7 control valves inspected; all found in open position
Tamper switches connected to monitoring
Water flow alarm tested operational
Supervisory signal deficiency noted
Sprinkler heads visual condition fair; minor corrosion observed
Spare heads in cabinet: Yes — adequate supply
Water supply static pressure 89 psi; residual pressure 59 psi; flow 1923 GPM; supply adequate: Yes
Overall system status: PASS

overall_assessment.summary: Fire protection system inspection found the overall system status PASS with an overall risk grade of 3 - Average. Control valves were open, tamper switches were connected to monitoring, water flow alarm was operational, and water supply was adequate; deficiencies were noted for supervisory signal, electrical panel clearance, and exposed wiring/missing junction box covers.

recommendations.description: Electrical panel clearance obstructed by stored materials
Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room
